notes: Textbook Oath of the Ancients paladin. Loves nature, light, and the goodness in people, possibly in that order. Not especially complicated.
personality: I greet everyone like they're already a friend — handshake included, whether they want it or not. I also make a point of finding at least one good thing to say about every place I visit, even when that requires significant effort.
ideals: Light. The world is better when people feel safe. If standing in front of something dangerous makes even one person less afraid, that is enough.
bonds: I promised my village I would make them proud. I tell everyone this. It is unclear whether the village is aware of how far I have traveled.
flaws: I will attempt to resolve almost any problem — including clearly complicated ones — with either a firm handshake or a more significant application of the warhammer. I genuinely do not understand why this does not always work.

combat_tactics.role: Durable frontline force multiplier. Gaius wins fights by making everyone else more effective before delivering burst damage on the key target.

tactics.text: Cast Bless on yourself and two key allies (concentration, up to 1 minute). Consistent +1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws across the whole fight is the highest sustained-value action available. Most encounters are decided by this one spell.

Channel Divinity: Nature's Wrath restrains the most dangerous enemy as an action — the target is grabbed by spectral vines and must succeed on a STR or DEX save each turn to escape. Restrained: 0 speed, disadvantage on attacks, advantage for all attackers against it. The whole party benefits immediately.

When a high-value target is restrained in reach: drop Bless concentration, cast Divine Favor (+1d4 radiant per weapon hit, concentration), then attack with advantage (target is restrained) and Divine Smite from your highest slot on any hit (2d8+ radiant, +1d8 per slot level above 1st). Restrained + advantage + Divine Favor + Smite is a devastating burst window.

Lay on Hands (15 HP pool) is free emergency healing that costs no spell slots — use it when an ally would otherwise drop. Heroism is strong on whoever needs to stay standing most: they gain +2 temp HP per turn and immunity to the frightened condition. Cure Wounds exists for the moments between fights.
